prompt: Create a polished 2D anime-style full-body fashion illustration of AI Lady, a glamorous adult woman standing confidently in a sunlit vintage room with tall multi-pane windows, dark carved wooden wall panels, a framed portrait on the left wall, and a small ornate gold teapot on a cabinet. She has voluminous short curly blonde hair with dramatic highlights, and her face is intentionally covered by a plain vertical beige rectangular censor block with no facial features visible. Pose her in a contrapposto stance: one hand on her hip, the other relaxed near the hem of her dress, long legs emphasized. Dress her in exactly 8 visible fashion elements: 1 white ruffled sleeveless mini dress with a flared skirt, 1 black glossy corset waist cincher with gold clasps, 1 layered gold necklace with star pendants, 1 bracelet on the left wrist, 1 bracelet on the right wrist, 1 anklet on the left ankle, 1 anklet on the right ankle, and 1 pair of metallic gold high-heeled platform sandals with bows. Use elegant glossy anime rendering, semi-realistic anatomy, warm afternoon sunlight streaming through the windows, bright rim highlights, soft shadows, reflective marble floor, subtle floating dust sparkles, rich brown and cream color palette, high detail fabric folds, polished skin highlights, and a vertical portrait composition.
